rationale: The only substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26's inline comment on test_expert_parallel_layout.py:121 noting that TP, built via the same init_vllm_model_parallel_group path, lacks the same device_communicator/reduce_scatter assertions added for PCP/DP/EP) is hit almost verbatim by Candidate X's first finding, down to the same line number. Candidate Y never raises this and instead recommends outright APPROVE with only one vague, low-actionability comment about dp_metadata caching. X's other two findings (untested pre-hook integration path, untested early-return/error branches in _set_forward_context_dp_metadata) are also concrete, grounded, and actionable with specific evidence, whereas Y's single comment lacks a concrete change request.
